_meta.description: PPP conversion factors: units of local currency per 1 international dollar (GDP-based)
_meta.methodology: PPP conversion factors adjust for differences in price levels between countries. Dividing a local-currency amount by the PPP factor gives a purchasing-power-adjusted 'international dollar' value, comparable across countries.
_meta.citation: World Bank, International Comparison Program database. Indicator PA.NUS.PPP — PPP conversion factor, GDP (LCU per international $).
